## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] CI / release

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --all-features` passes
- [ ] Coverage stays at or above the project threshold (95%)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/`) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets, private URLs, or generated artifacts committed

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, limitations. -->
